description: Composition Red and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a pointed narrow collar, a full front press stud placket, long sleeves with press stud cuffs, yoked back and a curved hem Fit Regular  Wash care Machine wash using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Wash and dry inside out Do not bleach, do not wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron  wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish checked shirt has a great Western look with its press stud fastenings, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.  Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”
